step.title: Handoff to ticket-grill
step.goal: Close the orient phase cleanly. Summarize the orient outcome for the user, leave a brief breadcrumb in the bundle's questions file so ticket-grill can resume in a fresh context, and recommend the ticket-grill skill as the next step.

substep.title: Write Orient Summary into Worklog
Update questions File last_updated
substep.action: uv run {base_dir}/scripts/stamp-frontmatter.py --file "{{session.worklog_path}}" --note "Orient phase complete; bundle scaffolded with primary tag {{session.candidate_tag}}. Ready for ticket-grill."
substep.note: stamp-frontmatter.py updates `last_updated`, `last_updated_by`, and REPLACES `last_updated_note` (git holds history per Lock 27 contract).

check.action: Surface the failure. Do not auto-fix. Halt the workflow.

substep.title: Present Final Handoff

section.title: Why write a handoff breadcrumb
section.description: Per spec §11, "the bundle artifacts on disk ARE the handoff state." ticket-grill may run in a fresh context (compaction, new session, different developer). The Orient Summary section is the breadcrumb that lets it resume without re-reading the user's original message or re-orienting.

section.title: The handoff IS the menu transition
section.description: ticket-orient does NOT auto-invoke ticket-grill. The user returns to the ticketsmith agent's menu and selects TG (ticket-grill). This keeps each skill independently invocable and matches the menu-driven architecture in the ticketsmith agent file.

rules.rule: Do not call invoke-skill on ticket-grill here
Do not assume the user will proceed to ticket-grill immediately — they may pause, review the bundle, then resume later
The recommendation in 7d is informational; the menu is the actual control surface

section.title: Final validation gate
section.description: Substep 7c is a defense-in-depth check. The bundle should already be valid (verified in step 6), but the Edit operation in 7a touched the questions file. Re-validating catches any frontmatter corruption from a stray edit.
